---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Veterinary Context

If relevant — is this based on a specific clinical workflow, regulation, or integration requirement?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references that would help.
